title: Quinquennial Review of the Armed Forces Compensation Scheme 2023: progress update
body: "The 2023 QQR of the AFCS provided an in-depth evaluation of the scheme, conducted to ensure it remains fair, effective, and fit for purpose.  This summary update outlines the MOD’s progress to date and will be followed by a detailed report. The forthcoming publication will set out key legislative amendments and enhancements to communication strategies, among other priorities, in response to the review. "
